basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras AI Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has officially announced the AI Engineer Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. ICSR/PR/Advt.130/2026 at the official website. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or related disciplines can submit their online applications before 30-07-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline. M.Tech. or higher is preferred.
qualification.details: AI Engineer: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline from a recognized institution. M.Tech. or higher qualification are preferred. Minimum 2-5 years of relevant experience in the design, development, deployment, and maintenance of AI/ML solutions. Experience in developing AI applications for government, enterprise, or digital public infrastructure projects is desirable.

salary_details.details: Consolidated Rs. 1,00,000/- to Rs. 1,20,000/- per month with 5% increment per year.

selection_process: Short-listed for Test/Interview on the basis of information provided in online applications.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras AI Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras AI Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Madras AI Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras AI Engineer Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Madras AI Engineer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: AI Engineer: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline from a recognized institution. M.Tech. or higher qualification are preferred. Minimum 2-5 years of relevant experience in the design, development, deployment, and maintenance of AI/ML solutions. Experience in developing AI applications for government, enterprise, or digital public infrastructure projects is desirable.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras AI Engineer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras AI Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras AI Engineer position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the AI Engineer position at IIT Madras is 30th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the AI Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. degree in relevant fields like Computer Science, AI, ML, Data Science, or ECE/Electrical Engineering. M.Tech. or higher is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the AI Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selected AI Engineer will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 1,00,000/- to Rs. 1,20,000/- per month, with a 5% annual increment.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2-5 years of relevant experience in designing, developing, deploying, and maintaining AI/ML solutions is required. Experience with government or public infrastructure projects is a plus.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the AI Engineer position?
faq.answer: Candidates will be shortlisted for a test or interview based on the information provided in their online applications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Madras AI Engineer recruitment is strictly online through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or temporary position?
faq.answer: The AI Engineer position at IIT Madras is a temporary role.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is ICSR/PR/Advt.130/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Madras offer any age relaxation for this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age relaxation details for this particular recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
